headings.usage: Brand Name and prominent button titles

layout_and_spacing.container: Mobile-first width. Use max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 sm:p-8.
layout_and_spacing.avatar_image: w-24 h-24 rounded-full shadow-md border-4 border-white object-cover
layout_and_spacing.button_structure: Every button must be a large clickable block (min-h-[88px]), flex flex-row items-center p-5 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group.

button_1_restaurant.icon_classes: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-white mr-4 flex-shrink-0
button_1_restaurant.arrow_icon: absolute right-5 opacity-0 -translate-x-2 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-0 transition-all text-white/50

button_2_clinic.bg_classes: bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
button_2_clinic.icon_classes: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-900 mr-4 flex-shrink-0
button_2_clinic.arrow_icon: absolute right-5 opacity-0 -translate-x-2 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-0 transition-all text-gray-400

button_3_gold.bg_classes: bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-yellow-500 hover:from-amber-500 hover:to-yellow-600 text-black shadow-lg shadow-amber-500/25 border border-amber-300/50
button_3_gold.icon_classes: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-black/10 flex items-center justify-center text-black mr-4 flex-shrink-0
button_3_gold.arrow_icon: absolute right-5 opacity-0 -translate-x-2 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-0 transition-all text-black/50

interactions_and_motion.buttons: Add hover:-translate-y-1 and active:scale-95 to all buttons. The right arrow icon should slide in on hover.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of the avatar, title, and each button (e.g., slide up with fade, staggerChildren 0.1s).

mapping.whatsapp: MessageCircle (or install react-icons and use FaWhatsapp)

avatar_placeholder.description: Minimalist 3D geometric tech logo to be used as the profile picture / avatar at the top of the page.

testing.attributes: Ensure all 3 CTA buttons have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='cta-restaurant', data-testid='cta-clinic', data-testid='cta-whatsapp').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React component acting as a premium link-in-bio.
Do NOT clutter the page. Only the avatar, title, subtitle, and the 3 buttons.
Use Framer Motion for the initial page load animations (staggered fade up).
Format the WhatsApp link correctly with the provided message: 'Olá, vi o link na bio e quero entender qual o melhor sistema para o meu negócio.'
Use standard anchor tags (<a>) for external routing or React Router links if internal.
Ensure the gold button feels genuinely premium—use the specified amber gradient, black text, and tight tracking.
Use standard Tailwind classes as defined in the components section.
Embed the provided avatar image URL in the top circular image slot.
